text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's just like me to choke when it matters most,
but... it's still so frustrating.
choice_data_list: You'll win the next one for sure!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, you're so positive! I did do my very best,
so I've got no regrets!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'm gonna really hit the track from now
on so I can come in first next time!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Of course! I can't let myself be satisfied with
results like these!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm taking home first place next time! I hope my
fans can hold tight a little longer!
